channel.title: china-static:middleeast
channel.description: Static RSS merge for china variant (middleeast)

item.title: NBA Draft 2026: Wizards select teen sensation AJ Dybantsa with No. 1 pick
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: The 6ft 8in (2.03m) 19-year-old forward was scooped by the Wizards after playing just one season of college basketball.

item.title: Which teams have qualified for the World Cup 2026 knockouts, round of 32?
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup knockout stage format, criteria and rules for qualification. Find out who's in and who's out.

item.title: Munoz sends Colombia into World Cup knockouts with 1-0 win over DR Congo
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Daniel Munoz's 76th-minute goal guided Colombia to a Group K win over DR Congo, sending them to the round of 32.

item.title: China takes US crown on ranking of world’s fastest supercomputers
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: China’s LineShine overtakes US-based El Capitan as most powerful supercomputer, according to the TOP500 list.

item.title: Trump claims US recouped Venezuela war costs 28 times over
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: US President Donald Trump claimed the United States has recovered its costs 28 times over through oil extraction.

item.title: Prada plays a part in designing NASA’s lunar mission spacesuits
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: NASA astronauts plan to return to the moon in 2028 wearing spacesuits made with more safety features and mobility.

item.title: Disinfectant brand apologises after ‘toxic men’ advert backfires in China
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Dettol has apologised after an advert in China intended to challenge sexism was accused of reinforcing it.

item.title: Syrians reject Trump’s call for Syria to combat Hezbollah in Lebanon
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Residents in Damascus rejected US President Donald Trump's suggestion that Syria should confront Hezbollah in Lebanon.

item.title: Budimir gives Croatia a 1-0 win to eliminate Panama from the World Cup
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Croatia are third in Group L, with England and Ghana on four points each, heading into the final round of matches.

item.title: US Senate votes to pause Iran war in rare rebuke to Trump
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: US Senate votes to pause Iran war in rare rebuke to Trump
